zh.Castle Ward, Northumberland, England, Un: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素 沃德
zh.lifeSummary: Irini Angelina於1228年出生在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。她和Roger Tancred至少有3個兒子。她去世於1303年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素 沃德享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Angelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian and Spanish (mainly Toledo): from the female personal name Angelina, a diminutive of Angela .

variants.name: Angela
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Angela, feminine form of Angelo .

West Indian (Dutch Caribbean): from the personal name Angela, feminine form of Angel (see Angel 1, compare 1 above). It is one of the surnames (compare Martina ) that reflect the partially mother-oriented name culture of the formerly enslaved people in the West Indies.

nameMeanings.name: Irini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek Eirēnaios, derivative of eirēnē ‘peace’; the name of several early saints venerated in the Eastern Church.

en.lifeSummary: Irini Angelina was born in 1228, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy. She had at least 3 sons with Roger Tancred. She died in 1303, in Castle Ward, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

ja.lifeSummary: Irini Angelinaは1228年にイタリアラズオロマロマで生まれた。彼女はRoger Tancredとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1303年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストル ワードで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irini Angelina(은)는 1228년 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Roger Tancred(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 카스틀 워드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Irini Angelina родилась в 1228 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Roger Tancred. Она умерла в 1303 г. в местности кастл вард, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.
